title: Tangy Crumbly Egyptian Beef Casserole
description: A bright, tangy casserole featuring lean minced beef, aromatic spices, and a crumbly lowfat topping-perfect for a comforting sickday meal.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add the diced onion; sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Increase heat to medium‑high, add the lean ground beef, breaking it up with a spoon, and cook until browned, about 8 minutes.
Stir in the tomato puree, cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, lemon juice, and apple cider vinegar; reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes to meld flavors.
Transfer the beef mixture to a greased 20cm (8inch) baking dish, spreading it evenly.
In a small bowl, combine the crumbled low‑fat feta and low‑fat breadcrumbs; sprinkle evenly over the beef.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the topping is lightly golden and the casserole is heated through.
Remove from oven, let rest 5 minutes, then serve warm.
